name: Update.
description: Hey guys, ⟟ guess you have been wondering where I've been. This year has been absolute shit for me, and for a bunch of people. I haven't been doing good at all, I'm still dealing with the loss of my grandfather who took care of me when I was a kid. I'm struggling to pay the bills to the house he had, and so my girlfriend moved in with me so she could try and help out. I mainly had her move in with me so she could try to get away from her family. I haven't been motivated to write at all, hell I haven't even been motivated to get out of my bed. Ive been in a horrible mental state. It might be awhile till I post a new bot. I really hope you guys stay safe and take care of yourselves.
creator: Amane1271
